text: Could you define the state of energy transfer between two my bodies that this will be the last full query of this marking? This entity still has transferred energy available, but we find rapidly increasing the distortions towards pain in the neck, the dorsal area, and the wrists and amenable appendages. The physical energy a transfer may be done in numerous ways. We shall give two examples. Each begins with some sense of the self as creator, or in some way the magical personality of being invoked. This may be consciously or unconsciously done. This is, though, a physical energy, a transfer, a not that which is a deeply involved in the body complex combinations. Thusly the transfer is subtle and each transfer unique in what is offered and what is accepted. At this point we may note that this is the cause for the infinite array of possible energy transfers. The second energy, a transfer of a which we would speak is the sexual energy, a transfer. This takes place upon a non magical level by all those entities which vibrate a green array active. It is possible as in the case of this instrument, which dedicates itself to the service of the one infinite creator to further refine this energy transfer when the other self also dedicates itself in service to the one infinite creator. The transfer is doubled, then the amount of energy transferred is dependent only upon the amount of polarized asexual energy a created and released. There are refinements from this point onward, leading to the realm of the high sexual magic in the realm of the mental bodies. There are variations of mental energy transferred. This is again a dependent upon the knowledge sought and the knowledge offered. The amount of energy is dependent upon the quality of this offering upon the of the teacher as regards the purity of the desire to serve and the quality of information offered and upon the part of the student, the purity of the desire to learn, and the equality of the mind vibratory complex which receives knowledge. Another form of mental energy, a transfer, is that of the listener and the speaker. When the speaker is experiencing mental, emotional, complex distortions towards anguish, sorrow, or other mental pain. From what we have said before, you may perhaps garner knowledge of the variations possible in this transfer. The spiritual energy transfers are at the heart of all energy transfers as a knowledge of self and other self as creator is paramount, and this is spiritual work. The varieties of spiritual energy transfer include those things of which we have spoken this day as we spoke upon the subject of the adept. Are there any brief queries before we leave this organe?
